name: @eclipse-zenoh/zenoh-ts
description: zenoh-nostd WASM TypeScript bindings — native Zenoh v9 protocol

scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && RUSTFLAGS='--cfg getrandom_backend="wasm_js"' cargo build --manifest-path Cargo.toml --no-default-features --features=web_console --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir ts/pkg ../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/zenoh_ts_wasm.wasm --out-name zenoh_ts_wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
